Navigation

1.1 Statements and the structure of a program

A computer program is a sequence of instructions that tells the computer what to do.

Best practice

Write programs in small, testable pieces.

Example

#include <iostream>

int main()
{
    std::cout << "Hello, world!\n";
    return 0;
}
TermMeaning
StatementA complete instruction in a program.
Reader comments should not appear.
